meta.note: Synthetic, deterministic news fixtures. Invented drivers/teams — NOT real people. Used to demo the news pipeline offline.

documents.title: Axel Rensu handed grid penalty for the Demo Grand Prix
documents.text: The stewards ruled that Axel Rensu will start with a grid penalty after a new power unit was fitted. It is official.

documents.title: Rumour: Borealis floor upgrade for Bo Renner could bring gains
documents.text: Reportedly, Borealis may run a new floor upgrade for Bo Renner. The team could find pace, though nothing is confirmed.

documents.title: Borealis confirms new floor upgrade for Bo Renner
documents.text: Borealis has confirmed an aerodynamic upgrade for Bo Renner for the Demo Grand Prix. It is official.

documents.title: Reliability concern flagged for Cade Voss
documents.text: A specialist report notes a reliability concern on the Cade Voss power unit after data from Friday running.

documents.title: Rain expected for Sunday's Demo Grand Prix
documents.text: Forecasters say rain is expected on Sunday, raising the chance of a wet race.

documents.title: Axel Rensu feeling unwell ahead of the race
documents.text: A named reporter says Axel Rensu is feeling unwell with a minor illness but intends to race.

documents.title: Borealis looking strong and confident with impressive pace
documents.text: The paddock mood is optimistic: Borealis looked strong and confident, with impressive, flying long-run pace.
